Amended Notice Of Pltf For Environmental Health'S Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Polyform Products Company
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH'S Amended Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Polyform Products Company.
APPEARANCES: Mark N. Todzo, Esq. of Lexington Law Group, LLP 759-4111 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. No opposition filed, and settlement complies with mandates of Health and Safety 25249.7 (f) (4). Order & judgment signed in open court. (302/JKS) JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR #4761
